headline: Capital One Software Introduces Databolt Connect for Secure Data Collaboration on Databricks Marketplace
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, June 16, 2026--Databricks Data + AI Summit – Capital One Software, the enterprise B2B software business of Capital One, today announced Databolt Connect, a purpose-built, lightweight application that facilitates secure, multi-party data collaboration in Databricks. Available in the Databricks Marketplace, an open marketplace for data, analytics, and AI, powered by OpenSharing, Databolt Connect provides privacy-preserving linking of sensitive datasets to enable groundbreaking resea

headline: July Fourth is around the corner. Here's how your credit card can help you save on last-minute travel
summary: When it comes to saving on last-minute bookings for July Fourth, your credit card may offer far more than just rewards.

headline: Why Are Capital One (COF) Shares Soaring Today
summary: Shares of financial services company Capital One (NYSE:COF) jumped 5.6% in the afternoon session after investment firm Baird named the stock a 'fresh pick,' citing multiple positive catalysts.
